title: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts - Yahoo Finance
text: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) analyst ratings, earnings estimates and price forecasts on Yahoo Finance. Multiple analysts provide buy/hold/sell recommendations with average price targets around $5.50. The consensus view suggests moderate buy rating with significant upside potential if the company can achieve profitability. Full-year 2026 revenue guidance of $135-165M provides framework for evaluating earnings growth.
